branding.name: Dr. Giacomo Moggioli
branding.title: from data to understanding
branding.description: I build elegant digital experiences that blend thoughtful design with robust engineering.

contact.headline: Let's keep in touch
contact.description: I'm always interested in hearing about new opportunities, collaborations, or just having a chat about technology and design. Feel free to reach out!

paragraphs: I'm a passionate professional focused on creating accessible, pixel-perfect digital experiences. My work lies at the intersection of design and development.

Creating experiences that not only look great but are meticulously built for performance and usability has always been my goal. I believe that great software should feel invisible, seamlessly integrating into people's lives while solving real problems.
Currently, I'm working on innovative projects that push the boundaries of what's possible on the web. I specialize in building scalable applications that deliver exceptional user experiences.
In my spare time, I enjoy contributing to open-source projects, writing technical articles, and exploring new technologies. I believe in continuous learning and sharing knowledge with the community.

items.title: Senior Software Engineer
